requests.name: Get Message Thread
requests.notes: Get messages between logged-in user and the other party for this listing. For landlords, add ?with=studentId. Marks incoming messages as read.

requests.name: Send Message (Student to Landlord)

body.body: Hi, is this property still available for the fall semester?

requests.notes: Student sends message — recipient is automatically the landlord. Max 1000 chars.

requests.name: Send Message (Landlord to Student)

body.body: Yes, it is! Would you like to schedule a tour?

requests.notes: Landlord sends message — must specify recipientId.

requests.name: Get Unread Message Count
requests.notes: Returns { count: number } of unread messages for the logged-in user.

requests.name: Get All Conversations
requests.notes: Returns all conversations grouped by listing + other party, sorted by most recent. Used for dashboard Messages tab.
